overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a neon-lit futuristic urban plaza at night, ascending stairs to a food stall, interacting with a vendor, then proceeding through a covered market street with digital billboards and street vendors.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with large orange industrial structures and digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the plaza past orange cylindrical buildings and illuminated advertisements

entered.detail: large orange industrial building with graffiti and metallic panels
large digital billboard displaying purple beverage advertisement with 'MAXIT UP' text
vertical digital screen showing cola advertisement with neon blue and red colors
wet reflective tile pavement in reddish-brown tones

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a futuristic urban plaza at night, passing large orange industrial structures covered in graffiti. Digital billboards illuminate the scene with purple and blue neon advertisements reflecting off the wet pavement. The area is sparsely populated with pedestrians walking in various directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete staircase leading to upper plaza level with cactus planter

events.description: begins ascending wide concrete staircase to upper level

agents.ego_description: climbing the stairs toward the food stall area on the upper level

notable_agents.action: pedestrian descending the stairs in the opposite direction

entered.detail: wide gray concrete stairs with metal railings leading upward
large rectangular planter with tall cacti and integrated orange benches

segments.scene_description: The player approaches and begins ascending a wide concrete staircase. A distinctive cactus planter with integrated seating sits at the base of the stairs. The orange building and billboards from the previous area fall behind as the player climbs toward an upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered noodle bar with purple neon lighting and wooden walls

events.description: approaches food stall counter and sits down to interact with vendor
stands up from the counter and prepares to leave the food stall

agents.ego_description: sitting at the food stall counter engaging in dialogue with the vendor, then standing up to leave

notable_agents.action: vendor with red hair and white shirt working behind the food counter

entered.detail: small food stall with white counter, green stools, and purple neon overhead lighting
dark wooden plank walls with colorful graffiti and posters
tall rack displaying multiple magazine covers or pamphlets
bright purple fluorescent tubes illuminating the stall ceiling

segments.scene_description: The player reaches the top of the stairs and enters a small noodle bar tucked under the structure. Purple neon lights illuminate the wooden walls covered in graffiti. The player sits at the counter to interact with a red-haired vendor, then stands up and prepares to leave the stall area.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending staircase with overlook view of lower plaza

events.description: descends the concrete stairs returning to the lower plaza level

agents.ego_description: walking down the stairs away from the food stall, overlooking the plaza below

entered.detail: elevated view through metal railings showing the lower plaza level with market stalls

segments.scene_description: The player leaves the food stall and descends the concrete stairs, passing the cactus planter once more. From the overlook, the lower plaza with its market stalls and digital billboards becomes visible through the metal railings as the player returns to ground level.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market street with food vendors and hanging red lanterns

events.description: enters the covered market street with hanging red paper lanterns and food stalls

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow market street passing various vendor stalls and shoppers

notable_agents.action: shopper in bright blue jacket walking toward the camera
pedestrian with red hair in plaid shirt walking ahead through the market

entered.detail: various food vendor stalls with awnings and illuminated displays lining the street
traditional red Japanese-style paper lanterns hanging from stall awnings
elevated pedestrian bridge or monorail track crossing above the street
tall building facade covered in multiple large digital screens and advertisements

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrow covered market street lined with food vendor stalls and illuminated by red paper lanterns. The street is moderately crowded with shoppers walking in both directions. Overhead, an elevated walkway crosses between towering buildings covered in massive digital billboards, creating a canyon-like atmosphere with mixed neon lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit futuristic plaza that ascends to a secluded food stall before descending into a crowded, canyon-like market street. It begins by moving across wet pavement reflecting purple and blue advertisements, passing graffiti-covered industrial structures and sparse pedestrians. As the camera approaches a concrete staircase marked by a cactus planter, it climbs toward an upper level and enters a small noodle bar illuminated by purple neon and wooden walls. The scene then shifts as the camera leaves the vendor and descends the stairs, returning to ground level while the lower plaza and its market stalls reappear through metal railings. Finally, the movement flows into a narrow covered street lined with red paper lanterns and shoppers, ending beneath an elevated walkway and towering digital billboards.
